headline: MCDONALD'S CORP (NYSE:MCD) Screens as a Top Dividend Stock with Strong Profitability and Financial Health
summary: Discover high-quality dividend stocks using a holistic approach: McDonald's (MCD) scores a Dividend Rating of 7, with strong profitability and financial health, offering a sustainable 2.73% yield and 7.33% annual dividend growth.
